Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.CollectionValidator

Packages that use CollectionValidator 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of CollectionValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return CollectionValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static <C extends Collection<E>,​ E>
    CollectionValidator<C,​E>    		 DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(C actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Collection.
    <C extends Collection<E>,​ E>
    CollectionValidator<C,​E>    		 Requirements.validateThat​(C actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Collection.

    Modifier and Type Method Description

    CollectionValidator<Set<K>,​K> MultimapValidator.keySet()  
    CollectionValidator<Collection<V>,​V> MultimapValidator.values()

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.entries​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Collection<Map.Entry<K,​V>>,​Map.Entry<K,​V>>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.keySet​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Set<K>,​K>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    MultimapValidator<K,​V> MultimapValidator.values​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Collection<V>,​V>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.

  • Uses of CollectionValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return CollectionValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    CollectionValidator<Set<Map.Entry<K,​V>>,​Map.Entry<K,​V>> MapValidator.entrySet()
    Returns a validator for the Map.entrySet().
    CollectionValidator<Set<K>,​K> MapValidator.keySet()
    Returns a validator for the Map.keySet().
    <C extends Collection<E>,​ E>
    CollectionValidator<C,​E>    		 JavaRequirements.validateThat​(C actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Collection.
    CollectionValidator<Collection<V>,​V> MapValidator.values()
    Returns a validator for the Map.values().

    Modifier and Type Method Description

    Verifies nested requirements.

    Verifies nested requirements.
    MapValidator<K,​V> MapValidator.values​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Collection<V>,​V>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

    CollectionValidator<Collection<E>,​E> ExtensibleArrayValidator.asCollection()
    Returns a validator for the actual value as a collection.

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement CollectionValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  CollectionValidatorImpl<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    Default implementation of CollectionValidator.
    class  CollectionValidatorNoOp<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    A CollectionValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
